action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. AugReg training failed multiple times due to truncated scripts causing DDP crashes. I have ~2.8 hours and 6 iterations remaining. Analysis: The train_augreg.py was truncated at the end, causing syntax errors. I need to write a complete, concise script. Decision: Write a minimal but complete train_augreg.py, train AugReg ViT-B/16 for 12 epochs with SWAD, then ensemble with CLIP.
